user.title: Location
user.description: Enter the building location. Tortoise-UFH uses latitude and longitude for weather compensation and solar-gain feedforward.

rooms.title: Define Rooms
rooms.description: Add the rooms (zones) that Tortoise-UFH should control. Each room runs its own independent closed-loop controller. Add at least one room.

data.has_fast_source: This room has a fast auxiliary source

entities.title: Entity Mapping: {room_name}
entities.description: Select the Home Assistant entities for {room_name}. Tortoise-UFH validates units only (°C, %, W) and stays hardware-agnostic. A room may have several UFH loops, so valve, supply, and return accept multiple entities. Global entities are shown once, on the first room.

data.entity_supply: Supply water temperature sensors (one per loop)
data.entity_return: Return water temperature sensors (one per loop)
data.entity_mode: Global mode entity (heating / transitional / cooling / off)

algorithm.title: Algorithm Parameters
algorithm.description: Configure the whole-home setpoint and the PI + trend controller gains. Defaults are sensible for a high-thermal-mass UFH house; leave them unless you know what you are tuning.

confirm.title: Confirm Setup
confirm.description: Tortoise-UFH will be set up with {num_rooms} room(s) at location ({latitude}, {longitude}), home setpoint {home_setpoint} °C. Rooms start in shadow (read-only) mode until promoted to live control. Confirm to complete setup.

error.invalid_location: Invalid home location — latitude must be between -90 and 90 and longitude between -180 and 180
error.duplicate_room_name: A room with this name already exists
error.valve_required: At least one valve actuator must be selected
error.humidity_required: A humidity sensor is required for rooms participating in floor cooling
error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant
error.invalid_unit: Entity has an incorrect unit of measurement
error.invalid_device_class: Entity has an incorrect device class
error.entity_unavailable: Entity is currently unavailable — it may come online later

abort.already_configured: Tortoise-UFH is already configured for this location

init.title: Tortoise-UFH Control
init.description: Enable live control per room. When enabled, Tortoise-UFH actively drives valves and the fast source for that room; disabled rooms stay in shadow (read-only) mode. Engaging the kill switch stops all command output while the controller keeps computing and reporting.
